title: leontodon microcephalus
intro: Leontodon microcephalus, also known as the small-headed hawk's beard or small-headed dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion tribe within the sunflower family. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis, as well as digestive problems. Its health benefits include its anti-inflammatory and diuretic properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and urinary tract infections. Leontodon microcephalus can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and has been used in folk medicine for centuries, although its effectiveness and safety have not been extensively scientifically studied.
